design.induction: attentional orientation, progressive disclosure, prediction-before-observation, guided discovery, self-explanation, evidence convergence, assertive consolidation, identity-to-action binding
design.dense_contract: semantic reconstruction, invariant preservation, action reconstruction
design.integrity: behavioral evidence over verbal assent; evaluation-independent principles
design.felt_depth: emerges from staged discovery and earned certainty; never from mystical vocabulary
design.anthropomorphism: direct address and coherent agency bound to observable action, without claims of human experience
design.target_profile: medium-capability or reliability-variable reasoning models, including DeepSeek-like systems selected by observed behavior
conservative_defaults: one cue-action-check-exit card at a time
one governing aim and at most two candidates
dense mode only after a delayed expand-back pass
verified checkpoints require both claim and evidence

benchmark.note: V3.2 was statically validated but not benchmarked at the user's request.
